summary: 4 film announcements, 2 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Ocean's Eleven Prequel
film.talent: Josh Gad, Margot Robbie, Bradley Cooper
film.announcement: Josh Gad joins the cast of the Ocean's Eleven prequel alongside Margot Robbie and Bradley Cooper.

film.title: The Gunfighter
film.announcement: RXM Entertainment vigilante movie sets Patrick Perez Vidauri to direct.

film.title: Khashaba
film.announcement: Nagraj Manjule's Khashaba unveils teaser and worldwide release date from Jio Studios.

film.title: Les Misérables
film.announcement: Trailer released for Les Misérables starring Vincent Lindon and Tahar Rahim.

tv.title: The Crow Girl
tv.announcement: Paramount+ reveals trailer for Season 2 of dark crime drama The Crow Girl.

tv.title: Sarek
tv.talent: Actors from Quicksand and Barracuda Queens
tv.announcement: Prime Video Nordics adapts Ulf Kvensler's debut novel Sarek as a psychological thriller series.
